content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Honest edges callout, 'Turn the probe and feel it' section",
    "evidence": "'Real embedding coordinates are neither small nor round; they are long ugly decimals a machine never has to look at.'",
    "suggestion": "'Real embedding coordinates are neither small nor round. They are long ugly decimals a machine never has to look at.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Honest edges callout, 'Name the machine you just used' section",
    "evidence": "'Nothing in the mechanism changes when you add more axes; you still multiply entry by entry and add, there are just more entries.'",
    "suggestion": "'Nothing in the mechanism changes when you add more axes. You still multiply entry by entry and add, there are just more entries.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-TELL-STRUCT",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Honest edges callout, 'What the meter gets wrong' section",
    "evidence": "'It is not a bug we hid; it is the exact gap the next session opens on.'",
    "suggestion": "'It's not a bug we hid. It's the exact gap the next session opens on.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "Throughout, e.g. 'Turn the probe and feel it' and 'What the meter gets wrong'",
    "evidence": "'So the score cannot be reading sameness of items.' / 'The meter cannot tell \"points the same way\" apart from \"just bigger.\"'",
    "suggestion": "'So the score can't be reading sameness of items.' / 'The meter can't tell...'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "Honest edges callout, 'Turn the probe and feel it' section",
    "evidence": "'the numbers in this session are chosen for readability'",
    "suggestion": "'we chose the numbers in this session for readability'"
  }
]

content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-REGISTER",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "first 'Honest edges' callout, under 'What does a taste look like as numbers?'",
    "evidence": "'the numbers in this session are chosen for readability'",
    "suggestion": "'we chose tidy numbers in this session for readability'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-RHYTHM",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "prediction prompts in sections 1-3",
    "evidence": "'Before you read on, take a guess' / 'Before you read on, call it' / 'Before you scroll on, call one more reading'",
    "suggestion": "keep the pause-and-predict move but vary the lead-in phrase each time so it doesn't read as a fill-in-the-blank template"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-TELL-STRUCT",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "end of 'What is the machine you just used?' into opening of 'Where does the meter travel, and where does it break?'",
    "evidence": "'Close the loop yourself before the next section' ... 'Time to close the loop.'",
    "suggestion": "use 'close the loop' once; cue the second recap with different wording"
  }
]

content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "The score behind the song, opening paragraph",
    "evidence": "'Somewhere in a data center two descriptions got compared, the verdict came back same taste, and a stranger's track landed in your ears like you had chosen it yourself.'",
    "suggestion": "'Somewhere in a data center two descriptions got compared. The verdict came back same taste, and a stranger's track landed in your ears like you had chosen it yourself.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "The score behind the song, closing line",
    "evidence": "'Try answering it first; it's genuinely harder than it sounds.'",
    "suggestion": "'Try answering it first. It's genuinely harder than it sounds.'"
  },

    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Fold each song into an arrow, opening paragraph",
    "evidence": "'Both moves fail the same way: one lets a single loud feature drown the rest, the other waits on a perfection no two real things reach.'",
    "suggestion": "'Both moves fail the same way: one lets a single loud feature drown the rest. The other waits on a perfection no two real things reach.'"
  },

    "pass": false,

    "where": "Fold each song into an arrow, 'So a big score means...' paragraph",
    "evidence": "'Direction earns the score; length can steal it.'",
    "suggestion": "'Direction earns the score. Length can steal it.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Same meter, different aisle, opening paragraph",
    "evidence": "'A song and a taste became two tangles of qualities, the tangles folded into arrows, and multiply-and-add collapsed the arrows into one score: a meter with a crack in it.'",
    "suggestion": "'A song and a taste became two tangles of qualities. The tangles folded into arrows, and multiply-and-add collapsed the arrows into one score: a meter with a crack in it.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "blocking",
    "where": "Same meter, different aisle, 'Now step out of the music app' paragraph",
    "evidence": "'It is you, the one doing the asking; the posting is the candidate.'",
    "suggestion": "'It is you, the one doing the asking. The posting is the candidate.'"
  }
]
